name: Raspberry Fuchsia Soup
recipeInstructions:
1. Puree the raspberries for the soup and strain through a sieve into a bowl.
2. Set aside the strained raspberry liquid in the sieve.
3. Transfer any seeds and lemon rind left in the sieve to a saucepan.
4. Add water to the saucepan and simmer for 5 minutes.
5. Strain the contents of the saucepan back into the bowl with the berry juice, discarding the seeds.
6. In a separate bowl or container, combine lemon juice, lemon rind, and arrowroot until smooth.
7. Mix this mixture with the berry juice in the main bowl.
8. Add maple syrup and strawberry wine to the mixture.
9. Transfer the saucepan back to low heat and simmer until thickened.
10. Refrigerate for 2 hours.
11. Serve individual bowls with a dollop of sour cream and a spoonful of berries on top.
